/home/admin/effcc/bin/effcc -O3 --target=e1x -DHW_BUILD -flto CMakeFiles/test_mtimer_scalar.dir/test_mtimer.c.o -o scalar/test_mtimer  ../../../stdlib/libeff.a ../../../drivers/uart/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_uart.a ../../../drivers/pinmux/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_pinmux.a ../../../drivers/i2c/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_i2c.a ../../../drivers/gpio/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_gpio.a ../../../drivers/spi/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_spi.a
